steps.title: Identify what the student wants to convey
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize a similarity between the two books. The notes reveal that both The Prophet and Those Barren Leaves entered the public domain—that's the shared characteristic to highlight.

steps.title: Find the choice that shows both books experiencing the same event
steps.content:
The correct answer uses parallel structure with “and” to present both books together: they both “recently entered the public domain.” This directly shows they experienced the same event.

The other choices emphasize differences rather than similarities, while B omits one of the books entirely.

That is the correct answer.
